title: cocculus urophyllus
intro: Cocculus urophyllus, also known as the snake berry or snake berry fruit, is a plant species native to India and Southeast Asia. Traditionally, Cocculus urophyllus has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and carminative effects. The health benefits of Cocculus urophyllus are said to include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and anxiety, as well as its potential to aid in weight loss and improve respiratory function. In herbal preparations, Cocculus urophyllus is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or powders, and is commonly combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
